value.found_quote: To avoid every session hitting the API at the same wall-clock moment, the scheduler adds a deterministic offset to fire times... The offset is derived from the task ID, so the same task always gets the same offset.
value.rationale: The page has a section titled "Jitter" describing a deterministic offset derived from the task ID, added to avoid every session hitting the API at the same wall-clock moment. This directly matches the claim. The feature is described as current behavior of the scheduler.
